name: 6pk LED Tealight Flameless Black Wick Candles White - Threshold™: Battery-Operated, Wax & Plastic
description:
Add a soft, pleasing glow to any setting with this 6-Piece LED Tealight Flameless Black Wick Candles from Threshold™. This black-wick candle set includes six LED flameless candles that illuminate your living space and fill it with a warm glow without worrying about actual flames. Designed in a white color, these battery-operated tealight candles will blend in with the rest of your home decor. Simply place them on any tabletop to set a pleasant, soothing setting for family and friends to enjoy.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
